backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Trip, Location, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app, including role-based access control, user profile management, and trip operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features all targeting RideRequestForm.tsx: fixing pickup field visibility (GPS vs manual mode), drop field visibility (journeyType/returnToSamePickup rules), and auto-fallback to manual mode on GPS failure.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the app's component and hook architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot', mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file configuring TanStack Router with role-based route guards for customer, driver, admin, and admin-upgrade routes, and conditionally rendering the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI tab displaying a searchable, scrollable table of all trips with customer/driver lookup, formatted pickup/dropoff locations, and color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, scrollable table of all users with their email, full name, role (color-coded badge), and join date. Fetches data via the `useGetAllUsers` hook.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips with pickup/dropoff locations and timestamps, allowing drivers to accept a trip via the `useAcceptTrip` hook with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges (color-coded), and creation timestamps fetched via `useGetMyTrips`.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card including service area, availability status, vehicle experience, and earnings, with duty status locked to On-Duty when the driver has an active accepted trip.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's trips segmented by status (active, completed, cancelled), with a 'Mark as Completed' button for accepted trips, using `useGetMyTrips` and `useCompleteTrip` hooks.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form for editing a driver's profile including service pincode, area name, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle, with availability locked to true when an accepted trip exists.
Dialog wrapper that renders `EditDriverProfileForm` inside a modal, passing through the user profile and accepted-trip lock state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with a top `Navigation` bar and a footer crediting caffeine.ai, using a flex-column full-height structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component that displays the app logo, user profile dropdown (with role-based dashboard navigation), and logout functionality using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their email and full name to create an initial profile without a role, which is assigned in a subsequent step.
Form component for customers to create trip requests, supporting local/outstation trip types, one-way/round-trip journey types, GPS or manual location input, vehicle selection, and duration/date-time configuration.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that prompts users to permanently select their role (customer, driver, or admin) after profile creation, with admin selection gated behind a setup code.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, role management, admin upgrade, and trip creation/retrieval operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, aggregate stats, and tabbed views for managing all users and trips platform-wide.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page with a form allowing a user to enter a secret setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's past and current trips side by side.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for available trips and the driver's own trips, plus a driver profile section with an edit modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with a login button that redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard after profile fetch completes.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Displays a role selection page (Customer, Driver, Admin) for authenticated users without an assigned role, redirecting already-roled users to their respective dashboards and unauthenticated users to the landing page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers to retain values across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch variables, border radius, fonts, shadows) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Namma Driver Pilot, documenting architectural rules for booking form field visibility (pickup/drop/GPS fallback) and listing implemented fix features with their requirement IDs.
